Smith October 29, 2010 Human Resources, Pay & Benefits Comments What is FEGLI? FEGLI is one of the many government programs with an acronym that is meaningless to the outside world and, perhaps, also unknown to many federal employees
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses FEGLI (Federal Employees' Group Life Insurance) and is unrelated to software development IDEs.
